description: Style NoteTired of your standard ballet flats? Looking for a comfy yet impossibly cool pair of shoes? This cheetah print flats from carlton london is the right pair for you. Red trims on a sober brown upper - you can style this with just about anything!Product Details Brown hairy upper with slip-on styling that has cheetah print all overRed bow at the toe box with red piping along the mouthTPU outsole with a circular lug at the heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust, grime or dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
